display.purpose: Game names on detail hero only. Bebas Neue condensed authority.

stats.purpose: Rajdhani for library-chip nav, sort, refresh, rings, filter pills, chrome counts.

body.purpose: Achievement lists, settings copy, chrome search input. System UI stack.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked tier section headers on game detail.

shadows.name: tier-icon-ring
shadows.purpose: Earned achievement icon wrap — tier-colored ring, not drop shadow.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default state transitions, progress bar fill, ring stroke.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Chip, button, and row hover backgrounds.

motion.name: progress-reveal
motion.purpose: Hero progress bar width animation on game detail load.

components.name: App Nav Chip
components.description: Page navigation inside library-chrome. Dashboard, Library, Settings, Help.
components.html: <nav class="ds-app-chrome__nav" aria-label="Main"><button type="button" class="ds-chip-app">Dashboard</button><button type="button" class="ds-chip-app ds-chip-app--nav-active" aria-current="page">Library</button><button type="button" class="ds-chip-app">Settings</button><button type="button" class="ds-chip-app">Help</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-app-chrome__nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; } .ds-chip-app { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 32px; padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Rajdhani', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); background: oklch(16% 0.014 275 / 0.88); border: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.02 275 / 0.45); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-chip-app:hover { background: oklch(20% 0.014 275 / 0.92); color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); } .ds-chip-app:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.14 230); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chip-app--nav-active { color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(60% 0.12 230) 14%, oklch(16% 0.014 275 / 0.92)); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(60% 0.12 230) 40%, transparent); }

components.name: App Action Chip
components.description: Primary page actions in library-chrome right slot: Refresh, Save, Export.
components.css: .ds-chip-app--action { color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); background: oklch(22% 0.014 275 / 0.92); border-color: oklch(45% 0.02 275 / 0.55); } .ds-chip-app--action:hover { background: oklch(28% 0.016 275 / 0.95); }

components.name: App Chrome Search
components.description: Canonical text field for app pages: library search, API key, folder paths.
components.css: .ds-input-chrome { width: 100%; min-height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.02 275); background: oklch(18% 0.014 275); color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input-chrome::placeholder { color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); } .ds-input-chrome:hover { background: oklch(22% 0.016 275); } .ds-input-chrome:focus { outline: none; border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(62% 0.14 230) 55%, oklch(34% 0.02 275)); background: oklch(22% 0.016 275); } .ds-input-chrome:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.14 230); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: App Chrome Header
components.description: library-chrome header row: nav left, search center, actions right, bottom border on black canvas.
components.css: .ds-app-chrome { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding-bottom: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.02 275); background: oklch(0% 0 0); } .ds-app-chrome__left { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-app-chrome__search { flex: 1 1 200px; min-width: 0; } .ds-app-chrome__right { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Hero Back Pill
components.description: Returns to library from game detail. Frosted pill over cover art; sentence case label.
components.css: .ds-chip-hero { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; min-height: 32px; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Rajdhani', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); background: oklch(12% 0.014 275 / 0.72); border: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.02 275 / 0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-chip-hero:hover { background: oklch(18% 0.014 275 / 0.85); border-color: oklch(40% 0.02 275 / 0.55); color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); } .ds-chip-hero:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.14 230); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chip-hero__icon { font-size: 1.05em; line-height: 1; opacity: 0.9; }

components.name: Tier Filter Chip
components.description: Tier filter bar on game detail. Uppercase Rajdhani with count badge.
components.css: .ds-chip-filter { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Rajdhani', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); background: oklch(16% 0.014 275 / 0.88); border: 1px solid oklch(34% 0.02 275 / 0.45); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-chip-filter:hover { background: oklch(20% 0.014 275 / 0.92); color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); } .ds-chip-filter:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(62% 0.14 230); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chip-filter__count { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 1.25rem; padding: 0 5px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; background: oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.08); color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); }

components.name: Tier Filter Chip Active (Gold)
components.description: Active tier filter — tier metal tint at 18% into dark base.
components.css: .ds-chip-filter--gold { color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 18%, oklch(16% 0.014 275 / 0.92)); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 45%, transparent); } .ds-chip-filter--gold .ds-chip-filter__count { background: oklch(100% 0 0 / 0.14); color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); }

components.name: Achievement Row Earned
components.description: Earned achievement with gold tier tint, full border, tier pill.
components.html:
Master of the Universe
Complete all story missions.
gold
components.css: .ds-achievement-row { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; } .ds-achievement-row--earned.ds-achievement-row--gold { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 12%, oklch(16% 0.014 275 / 0.92)); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 32%, oklch(34% 0.02 275 / 0.5)); } .ds-achievement-row__icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(28% 0.018 275); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-achievement-row__body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-achievement-row__name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: oklch(93% 0.01 275); } .ds-achievement-row__desc { font-size: 11px; color: oklch(70% 0.014 275); margin-top: 2px; line-height: 1.45; } .ds-achievement-row__aside { text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tier-pill { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: capitalize; border: 1px solid; } .ds-tier-pill--gold { color: oklch(78% 0.15 88); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 16%, oklch(22% 0.016 275)); border-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(78% 0.15 88) 45%, oklch(34% 0.02 275)); }

narrative.overview: AchieveMe is a late-night desktop companion: familiar dark gaming chrome with a trophy shelf inside it. The visual system has two canonical layers: Library chrome (black canvas, Rajdhani pill nav, library-chip actions) for Library, Dashboard, Settings, and Help; and Game Detail (Bebas titles, tier rows, completion rings) for per-game trophy surfaces. Library is the reference app shell. Dashboard, Settings, and Help must migrate off legacy app-nav onto library-chrome. Game Detail is complete.
keyCharacteristics: Pure-black app canvas on Library and all migrated app pages
library-chip Rajdhani pills for app nav, sort, and page actions
library-chrome embedded header — not a separate app-nav bar
Bebas Neue for game titles only; system UI for lists and settings copy
Frosted hero pills on cover art; matte pills everywhere else
Tier-tinted earned rows with full borders — never side-stripe accents
Progress blue for rings, bars, and active nav chip; action blue for focus only

rules.name: The Black Canvas Rule
rules.body: App pages use oklch(0% 0 0) as the page background via .library. Do not put Dashboard, Settings, or Help on --bg-base alone.

rules.name: The Metals Mean Earned Rule
rules.body: Trophy metal colors appear on earned achievements, tier filter active states, and completion celebration — never as generic decoration on inactive chrome.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Progress blue carries functional progress UI and active app-page nav state. Action blue is focus-only. Do not reintroduce Discord-purple (#5865f2).

rules.name: The Display Boundary Rule
rules.body: Bebas Neue is reserved for game titles on the detail hero. Everything interactive on app pages uses Rajdhani chips or system UI.

rules.name: The Chip Voice Rule
rules.body: App navigation, sort controls, and page-level actions speak in Rajdhani uppercase pills (library-chip) — not system-font rectangular buttons.

rules.name: The Flush Chrome Rule
rules.body: App navigation lives inside .library-chrome, not a separate elevated app-nav bar. One header row, one bottom border, content below.

rules.name: The Cover Glass Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur is allowed on hero pills over game art. Nowhere else unless the surface is literally over a photograph.

rules.name: The Flat Row Rule
rules.body: Achievement rows and library list rows do not use box-shadow at rest.

dos: Do use Library chrome (.library + .library-chrome + .library-chip) as the app shell for Dashboard, Settings, Help, and Library.
Do use CSS custom properties from :root — never hardcode #1a1a22 or #5865f2.
Do use library-chip for app navigation, page actions, and sort/filter on app pages.
Do use library-chrome__search styling for text inputs on app pages.
Do use Rajdhani uppercase pills for tier filters and hero actions on game detail.
Do tint earned achievement rows with color-mix and full borders.
Do provide prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for bar fills, ring transitions, and skeleton pulse.
donts: Don't use or extend app-nav / app-nav__link — deprecated in favor of library-chrome embedded nav.
Don't put Dashboard, Settings, or Help on a separate shell from Library.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard patterns: cream backgrounds, identical card grids, eyebrow kickers, hero-metric templates.
Don't use gambling or RGB-neon aesthetics.
Don't use rectangular default button for primary actions on app pages when library-chip applies.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on rows or cards.
Don't apply Bebas Neue to buttons, nav labels, or achievement list items.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism on list rows or library cards.
